headline: Dividend Harvesting Portfolio Week 263: $26,300 Allocated, $2,854.02 In Projected Dividends
summary: Dividend Harvesting Portfolio update: 8% yield with $2,854 forward income; buys SPYI & QQQI to hedge volatility, reinvest dividends, and grow.

headline: Robert Herjavec Says Tough Markets Reward B2B Companies That Deliver Real Value: 'Nobody Cares About...'
summary: Robert Herjavec says tough economic times create opportunities for B2B companies prioritizing value over relationships. Money flows to disruptive value, not loyalty.
